src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest import with jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Replace external JSONUtil library calls with internal JsonUtil utility methods to remove dependency or standardize JSON handling.
Add log level checks (isInfoEnabled) before constructing log messages to improve performance by avoiding unnecessary string concatenation and object serialization.
Improve request logging by using a dedicated ClientIpUtil for IP extraction and formatting logs with StringBuilder for better readability and structure.
Update variable naming conventions and remove unused imports/parameters to align with modern Java coding standards.
Replace explicit generic type arguments in HashMap instantiation with diamond operator for cleaner code.
Remove the entire AuthorizationServerConfiguration class that relied on the deprecated spring-security-oauth2 library, which is incompatible with Spring Security 5+ and Java 17.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Commented out or deleted the class extending AuthorizationServerConfigurerAdapter and all associated imports.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace Spring Security OAuth2 ClientDetailsService with custom OauthClientService and ScopeDefinitionService to support dynamic client and scope definitions.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced `clientDetailsService.loadClientByClientId` with `oauthClientService.findByClientId` and added loop to fetch `ScopeDefinition` for each scope.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update the model attributes passed to the view to include application name and human-readable scope definitions instead of raw client details.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed `model.put("client", client)` to `model.put("applicationName", client.getApplicationName())` and populated scopes with definitions.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Simplify the helper method for extracting the host from a redirect URI by removing complex URI reconstruction and exception handling.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced `getHost` method logic with simple string concatenation based on `uri.getScheme()`, `uri.getHost()`, and `uri.getPort()`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Adjust request mapping paths and method signatures to align with the new controller structure and parameter binding.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Added `@RequestMapping("/oauth")` to class, changed method mapping to `/confirm_access`, and updated parameters to use `@ModelAttribute` and `ModelMap`.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Explicitly define server port and context path properties.
Configure the size of the scheduling task pool.
Configure file-based logging with path and history retention.
Enable and configure Tomcat access logs with rotation.
Switch to the MySQL 8.0 compatible JDBC driver class.
Update datasource URL to include MySQL 8.0 specific parameters like serverTimezone and allowPublicKeyRetrieval.
Configure HikariCP connection pool max lifetime.
Configure JPA Hibernate settings including DDL auto and dialect.
Enable Liquibase for database schema migration.
Add application-specific configuration for JWT, OAuth2 issuer, captcha, and third-party integrations.

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Replace Bootstrap 4.0.0 grid CSS with Bootstrap 5.2.3 to adopt modern CSS variables and remove IE11 vendor prefixes.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced entire file content from Bootstrap v4.0.0 to v5.2.3, introducing :root variables and removing @-ms-viewport.

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Replace Bootstrap Grid CSS from version 4.0.0 to 5.2.3 to adopt modern CSS variables and remove IE11 vendor prefixes.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced content of bootstrap-grid.min.css with v5.2.3 minified output

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Replace Bootstrap 4 grid assets with Bootstrap 5 grid assets to align with modern frontend standards.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced bootstrap-grid.min.css.map content from v4.0.0 to v5.2.3

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Upgrade Bootstrap Reboot CSS from version 4.0.0 to 5.2.3 to align with modern frontend standards.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced entire file content with Bootstrap 5.2.3 reboot styles, including new CSS variables and updated selectors.
